summary: Iteration 34: All 5 NEW changes verified - Backend 15/15 passed (100%), Frontend all tests passed. Heva One rebranding complete, geofence enforcement working, staff profile fields added, business type onboarding working.
critical_code_review_comments: Geofence implementation uses haversine_distance() correctly with 10m radius
Staff model includes all new fields: position, hourly_rate, phone, employment_type, joining_date, tax_id
Business Type dropdown has 9 options: restaurant, cafe, bar, takeaway, retail, salon, gym, hotel, other
Heva One branding consistent across login page, sidebar, and footer
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 34 verified all 5 NEW changes: (1) Floating clock button hidden on POS screen - VERIFIED, (2) Geofence 10m enforcement - VERIFIED with haversine distance calculation, (3) Staff richer profile fields - VERIFIED (position, hourly_rate, phone, employment_type, joining_date, tax_id), (4) Heva One branding - VERIFIED on login, sidebar, footer, (5) Business Name + Business Type onboarding - VERIFIED with 9 business types. Business rest_demo_1 has lat=51.5074, lng=-0.1278 for geofence testing.

heva_one_branding_login.evidence: Login page shows 'HevaOne' logo and 'Powered by Heva One' footer

heva_one_branding_sidebar.evidence: Sidebar shows 'Heva One' with 'RESTAURANT' or 'PLATFORM' label

geofence_within_10m_succeeds.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock with exact business coords returns 200

geofence_outside_10m_fails_403.evidence: POST /api/attendance/clock with Paris coords returns 403 with distance message

staff_new_fields_create.evidence: POST /api/restaurant/staff with position, hourly_rate, phone, employment_type, joining_date, tax_id succeeds

staff_new_fields_update.evidence: PUT /api/restaurant/staff/{id} with new fields updates correctly

business_management_title.evidence: Platform Owner /restaurants page shows 'Business Management' title

business_name_field.evidence: Add Business dialog has 'Business Name *' field

business_type_dropdown.evidence: Add Business dialog has 'Business Type *' dropdown with restaurant, cafe, bar, etc.

module_toggles.evidence: Add Business dialog has POS, KDS, QR Ordering, Workforce checkboxes

settings_lat_lng_fields.evidence: Settings → Business Info has Latitude and Longitude fields with '(for geofence clock-in)' label

settings_staff_form_new_fields.evidence: Settings → User Management → Add Staff has Position, Hourly Rate, Phone, Employment Type, Joining Date, NI/Tax ID fields
